originalTitle: Trump’s billion-dollar crypto haul triggers some everyday investors sitting on big losses
summary: Millions of crypto investors around the world are sitting on losses as a painful bear market erases trillions of dollars in paper profits.
content: Millions of crypto investors around the world are sitting on losses as a painful bear market erases trillions of dollars in paper profits.
chineseTitle: 特朗普数十亿美元的加密货币大手笔让一些普通投资者蒙受巨额损失
chineseSummary: 由于痛苦的熊市抹去了数万亿美元的账面利润，全球数百万加密货币投资者正遭受损失。
chineseContent: 由于痛苦的熊市抹去了数万亿美元的账面利润，全球数百万加密货币投资者正遭受损失。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
